raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, my American Express credit card was charged {$49.00} by XXXX. I immediately disputed this charge, as the service was unsatisfactory and I had canceled shortly after the purchase. 

I had to dispute this charge XXXX separate times, and in each case American Express failed to provide proper notification : 1. First dispute : I was temporarily refunded the amount. Later, the funds were withdrawn again, but I never received any official resolution no email, no letter, and nothing appeared in my account ( the View Resolution Letter section remained blank ).

2. Second dispute : I reopened the case. This time, I received a physical letter by mail stating that the dispute was denied. However, again, there was no record in my online account, no secure message, and no resolution document available to view. 
3. Third dispute : I reopened the case again via live chat on XX/XX/year>. The agent suspended the {$49.00} charge again and asked me to submit supporting documents, which I uploaded through the official document center. However, until now ( XX/XX/XXXX ), no updates have been provided, and the charge still hasnt been removed or reflected in my account. The dispute status still shows blank, and I have received no communication. 

Despite multiple attempts, American Express has failed to comply with the requirement to provide timely and clear dispute resolution communication, and I still have no resolution or refund.
